Eurovision Song Contest

🇺🇦2017

International Exhibition Centre · Kyiv , Ukraine

"Celebrate Diversity"

Hosted by Oleksandr Skichko · Volodymyr Ostapchuk · Timur Miroshnychenko Broadcaster National Public Broadcasting Company of Ukraine (UA:PBC)
